title: Barfani dham
tagline: Barfani dham — spiritual town of Chhattisgarh

overview.short: Barfani Dham (Patal Bhairvi) is a temple in the town of Rajnandgaon in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: Barfani Dham (Patal Bhairvi) is a temple in the town of Rajnandgaon in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is 40 kilometres (25 mi) from Durg towards Nagpur. A large Shiva Linga can be seen at the top of the temple while a large Nandi statue stands in front of it.

topPlaces.name: Digvijay Stadium
topPlaces.description: Digvijay Stadium (Hindi: दिग्विजय स्टेडियम) is an international multi-sports stadium in Rajnandgaon, India. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.

topPlaces.name: Rajnandgaon
topPlaces.description: Rajnandgaon is a city in Rajnandgaon District, in the state of Chhattisgarh, India. As of the 2011 census the population of the city was 163,122.

topPlaces.name: Bhanpuri
topPlaces.description: Bhanpuri is a census town in Raipur District in the state of Chhattisgarh, India.

items.note: Digvijay Stadium (Hindi: दिग्विजय स्टेडियम) is an international multi-sports stadium in Rajnandgaon, India. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.
Rajnandgaon is a city in Rajnandgaon District, in the state of Chhattisgarh, India. As of the 2011 census the population of the city was 163,122.
Bhanpuri is a census town in Raipur District in the state of Chhattisgarh, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Barfani dham?
faq.a: The best time to visit Barfani dham is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Barfani dham?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Barfani dham?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Barfani dham at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Barfani dham?
faq.a: Stays in Barfani dham start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Barfani dham?
faq.a: The top attractions are Digvijay Stadium, Rajnandgaon, Bhanpuri.
